summary: All contract requirements are satisfied based on the supplied evidence. Legacy files are deleted (confirmed by diff showing deletions). File/directory renames completed (new files exist at correct paths without v2 suffixes). Command names, type names, state keys, constants, import paths, and custom entry types all use clean non-v2 names in the evidenced source files. The /plan-next command is registered. README is updated with accurate descriptions. Tests reference correct paths and assert correct command surfaces.

findings.title: npm test pass cannot be verified from static evidence
findings.details: CHK-3 requires running `npm test` to confirm all tests pass. The test files shown have correct imports and assertions consistent with the renamed source files, but actual test execution was not observed.
findings.suggestedFix: Run `npm test` to confirm all tests pass.

strengths: All 7 legacy files confirmed deleted via diff (plan-feature.ts, tdd-plan.ts, docs/plan-feature-spec.md, and 4 test files).

Full evidence of v2 removal: extensions/plan.ts uses PlanningState (not PlanningV2State), PLANNING_STATE_TYPE, ctx.state.planning, planning-session entry type. extensions/implement/loop-state.ts uses ImplementPlanLoopState, IMPLEMENT_LOOP_STATE_TYPE, ctx.state.implementPlanLoop, implement-plan-loop-session entry type. All import paths use ./planning/ and ./implement/ without v2.

Command surface verified: plan.test.ts asserts ['end-planning', 'plan', 'plan-answer', 'plan-next', 'plan-save', 'plan-status']; implement-plan-loop.test.ts asserts ['end-implement-plan-loop', 'implement-plan-loop', 'implement-plan-loop-status']. No v2 command names anywhere.
Artifact paths use .pi/generated-implementation (not v2) as confirmed in implement-plan-loop.test.ts assertions.
README cleanly replaces legacy plan-feature.ts and tdd-plan.ts sections with accurate descriptions of plan.ts, planning/, implement-plan-loop.ts, and implement/.
package.json unchanged as required, using directory glob.
